basics.name: Minal Raval
basics.title: Software Developer | Backend Developer (Laravel & CodeIgniter)
basics.summary: Result-oriented Software Developer with 3+ years of experience in PHP-based backend development, specializing in Laravel and CodeIgniter. Proven ability to design scalable applications, develop secure RESTful APIs, and manage end-to-end project lifecycles. Experienced in leading small teams, coordinating with clients, and delivering high-quality solutions on time. Strong problem-solving skills with a focus on performance, clean architecture, and continuous improvement.

bullets: Lead development of backend architecture using Laravel and CodeIgniter for multiple client projects.
Designed, developed, and maintained scalable RESTful APIs with secure authentication.
Optimized MySQL database schemas and queries to improve application performance.
Integrated third-party services including Google Maps, Twilio SMS, and Zoom APIs.
Managed and mentored backend developers, conducted code reviews, and ensured coding standards.
Collaborated closely with frontend teams and stakeholders to translate business requirements into technical solutions.
Owned project timelines, task allocation, and successful delivery of features.
Developed backend modules and business logic using PHP and Laravel.
Built and consumed REST APIs and handled third-party integrations.
Improved application stability through debugging, refactoring, and optimization.
Worked with Git for version control and assisted in deployment activities.
Participated in requirement analysis and implemented client-specific features.

projects.title: Fleet Manager
projects.stack: Laravel, MySQL, Google Maps API, Android Push Notifications
bullets: Developed full admin panel with CRUD operations, driver APIs, Google Maps live location tracking, and Android push notifications.

projects.title: My Nuceria
bullets: Built dynamic admin system and implemented multilingual frontend using Google Translate API.

projects.title: Alankar Publications
bullets: Created online book catalog with advanced search and book preview functionality.

projects.title: FunAndMoving.com
bullets: Developed CMS for landing page management with multilingual support and Twilio SMS integration.

projects.title: Telehealth Platform (In Progress)
bullets: Designed hospital management system with role-based access and Zoom API integration for online consultations.

projects.title: Marcotex
bullets: Enhanced UI/UX performance and developed responsive pages.

projects.title: Two12 & Nilayam
bullets: Developed complete custom websites from scratch based on client requirements.
